description: This Java class defines a risk scoring and decisioning engine for loan applications, including methods for analyzing JSON input to produce a risk score and loan decision. It includes logic for handling various input fields and making transparent, rule-based decisions.

classes.name: RiskDecisioningService
classes.description: Service component that computes risk scores and loan decisions based on JSON input data.

methods.name: scoreAndDecide
methods.description: Calculates risk score and decision by analyzing provided draft JSON data, applying rule-based logic, and returning a decision record.

methods.name: buildReason
methods.description: Generates a detailed textual explanation of the scoring and decision, including input data and decision thresholds.

methods.name: readJsonOrEmptyObject
methods.description: Parses input JSON string into a JsonNode, returning an empty object node if parsing fails or input is invalid.

methods.name: firstDecimal
methods.description: Selects and returns the first valid decimal value from a list of JsonNode candidates.

methods.name: firstInteger
methods.description: Selects and returns the first valid integer value from a list of JsonNode candidates.

methods.name: firstBoolean
methods.description: Selects and returns the first valid boolean value from a list of JsonNode candidates.
